urls.title: Agent view in Claude Code | Claude

Available on all paid plans.

See what's running, what's waiting on you, and what's done at a glance. Reply inline to unblock, or jump in and out of any session without losing your place.
Run claude agents to start dispatching multiple sessions at once. Each one keeps running without taking up a terminal tab.

New in Claude Code: agent view.

One list of all your sessions, available today as a research preview. https://t.co/NnbsAQjSPW

urls.title: Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS | Claude
urls.description: The Claude Platform on AWS is now generally available, offering a new way for AWS customers to access the full set of Claude platform features with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement.

tweets.text:
The Claude Platform on AWS is available today. Claude also remains available on Amazon Bedrock, where AWS is the data processor.

Read more: https://t.co/cEFftPcYPL

Build and deploy agents at scale with Claude Managed Agents, or use features like the advisor strategy, code execution, web search, and more.

Anthropic operates the service, and all new features ship the same day they go live on the native Claude API.

The Claude Platform on AWS is now generally available.

AWS customers get the full set of Claude API features, with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. https://t.co/9WPrEgCpkg

urls.title: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
urls.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

tweets.text: Read more about our usage limit increases and our SpaceX compute partnership: https://t.co/4Pf6r5zKjl

Our agreement with @SpaceX means we will use all the compute capacity at their Colossus 1 data center.

This will give us over 300 megawatts of additional capacity to deploy within the month.

Effective today, we are:

1) Doubling Claude Code’s 5-hour rate limits for Pro, Max, and Team plans;

2) Removing the peak hours limit reduction on Claude Code for Pro and Max plans; and

3) Substantially raising our API rate limits for Opus models.

We’ve agreed to a partnership with @SpaceX that will substantially increase our compute capacity.

This, along with our other recent compute deals, means that we’ve been able to increase our usage limits for Claude Code and the Claude API.

RT @ClaudeDevs: Code with Claude is happening now!

▪︎ 9:00AM - Keynote 
▪︎ 10:30AM -  What's new in Claude Code
▪︎ 11:15AM - Building on C…

urls.title: Claude Security | Claude by Anthropic
urls.description: From scan to fix, seamlessly. Claude scans your codebase for vulnerabilities, validates findings, and recommends patches you can review and approve.

tweets.text:
Available today in public beta for Claude Enterprise customers.

Learn more: https://t.co/Oei6EHTZuX

Since the research preview in February, hundreds of organizations have used it on production code, catching issues existing scanners had missed. 

Based on early feedback, we've added scheduled scans, directory-level targeting, CSV and Markdown exports, webhook notifications for

note_tweet.text:
Since the research preview in February, hundreds of organizations have used it on production code, catching issues existing scanners had missed. 

Based on early feedback, we've added scheduled scans, directory-level targeting, CSV and Markdown exports, webhook notifications for new findings, and dismissals that carry forward across scans.

tweets.text: Many security teams have asked how to put Opus 4.7 to work on their code without standing up custom tooling. Claude Security is that on-ramp: no API integration or agent build required.

Claude Security is now in public beta for Claude Enterprise customers.

Claude scans your codebase for vulnerabilities, validates each finding to cut false positives, and suggests patches you can review and approve. https://t.co/neYmbGYeRz

urls.title: Claude
urls.description: Claude is Anthropic's AI, built for problem solvers. Tackle complex challenges, analyze data, write code, and think through your hardest work.

urls.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7
urls.description: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 is a notable improvement on Opus 4.6 in advanced software engineering, with particular gains on the most difficult tasks.

tweets.text:
Claude Opus 4.7 is available today on https://t.co/tHPAZRgiuP, the Claude Platform, and all major cloud platforms.  

Read more: https://t.co/FXsCSDFSv3

In Claude Code, the new /ultrareview command runs a dedicated review session that reads through your changes and flags what a careful reviewer would catch.

We've also extended auto mode to Max users, so longer tasks run with fewer interruptions.

On the API, a new xhigh effort level between high and max gives you finer control over reasoning and latency on hard problems. Task budgets (beta) help Claude prioritize work and manage costs across longer runs.
Opus 4.7 also has substantially better vision. It can see images at more than three times the resolution and produces higher-quality interfaces, slides, and docs as a result.

Introducing Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable Opus model yet.

It handles long-running tasks with more rigor, follows instructions more precisely, and verifies its own outputs before reporting back.

You can hand off your hardest work with less supervision. https://t.co/PtlRdpQcG5
@ClaudeDevs is now on X.

urls.title: Automate work with routines - Claude Code Docs
urls.description: Put Claude Code on autopilot. Define routines that run on a schedule, trigger on API calls, or react to GitHub events from Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure.

urls.title: Claude Code by Anthropic | AI Coding Agent, Terminal, IDE
urls.description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool for developers. Claude Code understands your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and helps you ship faster.

tweets.text:
Available today across all paid plans, ​​with Claude Code on the web enabled.

Docs: https://t.co/TdOiIxRhKe
Read more: https://t.co/4M6Rl70dqK

Scheduled routines let you give Claude a cadence and walk away. Try telling Claude to pull the top bug from Linear every night at 2am, attempt a fix, and open a draft PR.

If you've been using /schedule in the CLI, those are routines now, and there's nothing to migrate.

Webhook routines subscribe to GitHub events and let Claude respond as they come in. Try pointing one at your repo and asking Claude to flag any PR that touches /auth-provider and post a summary in #auth-changes.

More event sources are coming soon.

note_tweet.text:
Routines each come with their own API endpoint, so you can point your alerts, deploy hooks, or internal tools at Claude directly. Try sending Claude an alert payload and asking it to find the owning service and post a triage summary to #oncall.

POST a message and get back a session URL.

tweets.text:
Routines each come with their own API endpoint, so you can point your alerts, deploy hooks, or internal tools at Claude directly. Try sending Claude an alert payload and asking it to find the owning service and post a triage summary to #oncall.

POST a message and get back a

Now in research preview: routines in Claude Code.

Configure a routine once (a prompt, a repo, and your connectors), and it can run on a schedule, from an API call, or in response to an event.

Routines run on our web infrastructure, so you don't have to keep your laptop open. https://t.co/m2XJWYqkf8

urls.title: The advisor strategy: Give Sonnet an intelligence boost with Opus | Claude
urls.description: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor, and get Opus-level intelligence in your agents at a fraction of the cost.

tweets.text:
Now available in beta on the Claude Platform.

Read more: https://t.co/FWbfVOKdaW
In evals, Sonnet with an Opus advisor scored 2.7 percentage points higher on SWE-bench Multilingual than Sonnet alone, while costing 11.9% less per task. https://t.co/pV4nftN1wz
Add the advisor tool to your Messages API call. When your Sonnet or Haiku agent hits a hard decision mid-run, it consults Opus, gets a plan, and continues, all within a single API request.

We're bringing the advisor strategy to the Claude Platform.

Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor, and get near Opus-level intelligence in your agents at a fraction of the cost. https://t.co/fRkegyMs5t

urls.title: Claude Code by Anthropic | AI Coding Agent, Terminal, IDE
urls.description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool for developers. Claude Code understands your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and helps you ship faster.

tweets.text:
Available now as a research preview on the Team plan. Enterprise and API access rolling out in the coming days.

Enable with claude --enable-auto-mode, then cycle to it with Shift+Tab.

Learn more: https://t.co/eOurVAnoKc

Before each tool call, a classifier reviews it for potentially destructive actions. Safe actions proceed automatically. Risky ones get blocked, and Claude takes a different approach.

This reduces risk but doesn't eliminate it. We recommend using it in isolated environments.

New in Claude Code: auto mode.

Instead of approving every file write and bash command, or skipping permissions entirely, auto mode lets Claude make permission decisions on your behalf.

Safeguards check each action before it runs. https://t.co/kHbTN2jrWw

urls.title: Cowork: Claude Code power for knowledge work | Claude by Anthropic
urls.description: Give Claude access to your local files and let it complete tasks autonomously. Claude Cowork brings Claude Code's agentic capabilities to the desktop app for non-technical work.

tweets.text:
Available on Pro and Max. 

Update your desktop app and pair with mobile to try: https://t.co/YhYFTjHZYK

Assign a task from your phone, turn your attention to something else, and come back to finished work on your computer.

Tell Claude once to scan your email every morning or pull a report every Friday, and it handles it from there. https://t.co/HeaBKnPl8D

Claude uses your connected apps first: Slack, Calendar, and other integrations.

When there's no connector for the tool you need, it asks for your permission to open the app on your screen directly. https://t.co/19b6sl6irI

You can now enable Claude to use your computer to complete tasks.

It opens your apps, navigates your browser, fills in spreadsheets—anything you'd do sitting at your desk.

Research preview in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, macOS only. https://t.co/sVymgmtEMI

urls.title: Download Claude | Claude by Anthropic
urls.description: Download Claude apps for Mac, Windows, iOS, and Android. Install extensions for Chrome, Excel, PowerPoint, and Slack.

tweets.text: Update or download the Claude desktop app to give it a try:  https://t.co/kWnDq1psWQ
